footer.affiliation: openswissdata.com is an independent private service. Not affiliated with opendata.swiss, BAZG, BFS, or FINMA.
footer.disclaimer_body: openswissdata provides products derived from official Swiss public data. The TARES dataset is delivered with written commercial permission from BAZG (reference BAZG-PERMISSION-2026-04-21-MICHAEL-BEER). The Classifications and FINMA datasets are republished with normalisation value-add, under a public 24-hour takedown procedure upon source authority request. These products are reformulations intended for business use. They do not replace the official publications; in case of discrepancy, the original sources prevail. Legal venue: Berne, Switzerland, for TARES datasets (per BAZG condition).
